seoTitle: Elizabeth Downs vs Elizabeth East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Elizabeth Downs and Elizabeth East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Elizabeth Downs vs Elizabeth East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elizabeth Downs and Elizabeth East.
heading: Elizabeth Downs vs Elizabeth East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elizabeth Downs, South Australia and Elizabeth East, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elizabeth Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Elizabeth East (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elizabeth Downs or Elizabeth East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Downs has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Elizabeth East scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Downs scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Elizabeth East scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elizabeth Downs or Elizabeth East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elizabeth Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
